 ## 🚨 SCHEMA GOTCHAS 🚨
+- `customers` PK: `customer_id` (NOT `id`!)
 - `subscriptions.status`: `'lead', 'subscribed', 'cancelled', 'lost'` (NOT 'active')
 - `subscriptions.plan` (not `plan_id`), use `s.effective_price` (not `s.price`)
@@ -15,5 +16,5 @@
 - `ad_channel_leads` columns: `id, day, channel_id, group_id, leads_generated, spend`
 - Issues table is `issues` (NOT customer_issues)
-- `list_research_projects()` returns DICT with `{'tiers': [...]}`
+- `list_research_projects()` returns DICT with `{'tiers': [...]}`, each tier has `in_progress, completed, total_quality_boost` (NOT status field)
 - `get_social_posts()` returns DICT with `{'posts': [...], 'total': n}`
 - R&D has 20 tiers (docs say 10, wrong)
